product_name: Regional Studies - eight place-based analytical pages (Africa, Berlin, East Asia, London, Mideast, Mongol, Russia, Western)
state_model: localStorage latest-run record and twenty-run history plus exportable JSON trace
acceptance_standard: The output must separate source signal, interpretive claim, uncertainty, and next evidence need.
not_full_operational_reason: This is a local single-user runtime slice. Full operational standing still requires repeated run evidence, screenshot/browser QA, source verification where relevant, and external or reviewer validation.
